monthly.name: volcengine /OpenViking
monthly.description: OpenViking is an open-source context database designed specifically for AI Agents(such as openclaw). OpenViking unifies the management of context (memory, resources, and skills) that Agents need through a file system paradigm, enabling hierarchical context delivery and self-evolving.

monthly.description: A Claude Code plugin that shows what's happening - context usage, active tools, running agents, and todo progress

monthly.name: promptfoo /promptfoo
monthly.description: Test your prompts, agents, and RAGs. Red teaming/pentesting/vulnerability scanning for AI. Compare performance of GPT, Claude, Gemini, Llama, and more. Simple declarative configs with command line and CI/CD integration. Used by OpenAI and Anthropic.
